title: [FEATURE-21] Slack Price Alert Notifications
body:
## Overview
Allow users to receive price alert notifications via Slack by configuring a Slack Incoming Webhook URL in their profile or per-alert settings.

## How It Works
Users generate a Slack Incoming Webhook URL in their Slack workspace and paste it into our app. No Slack OAuth app installation required.

**To generate a webhook:**
1. Go to `https://api.slack.com/apps` → Create App → Incoming Webhooks
2. Enable webhooks and add to a channel
3. Copy the webhook URL (format: `https://hooks.slack.com/services/T.../B.../...`)

## Notification Message Format (Block Kit)

```json
{
  "blocks": [
    {
      "type": "section",
      "text": {
        "type": "mrkdwn",
        "text": ":fire: *Price Alert: The Witcher 3*\n75% off — now *$4.99* (was $19.99) on GOG"
      },
      "accessory": {
        "type": "image",
        "image_url": "https://cdn.../cover.jpg",
        "alt_text": "The Witcher 3"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "actions",
      "elements": [
        { "type": "button", "text": { "type": "plain_text", "text": "Buy on GOG" }, "url": "https://gog.com/..." },
        { "type": "button", "text": { "type": "plain_text", "text": "See all prices" }, "url": "https://theresalwaysadeal.com/games/..." }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

## Tasks
- [ ] Add `notify_slack_webhook` field to `price_alerts` and `users` (already in schema from #2)
- [ ] Implement `SlackNotificationService.sendPriceAlert(webhookUrl, alertData)`:
  - `POST` the Block Kit JSON payload to the webhook URL
  - Handle 4xx errors (invalid webhook) — disable the webhook and notify user via email
  - Handle 5xx / network errors — retry up to 3 times with exponential backoff
- [ ] Consume from the same notification job queue as the email service (#20)
- [ ] Add a "Test Notification" endpoint: `POST /api/user/me/alerts/test-slack` — sends a test message to the configured webhook
- [ ] Store Slack webhook URLs encrypted at rest (AES-256)
- [ ] Log all notification attempts in `alert_notifications` table with `channel = 'slack'`

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can add a Slack webhook URL per alert or globally in their profile
- Price alert messages are delivered to Slack with game image and buy links
- Invalid webhook URLs are caught and reported to the user via email
- Test notification endpoint confirms webhook is working

## Dependencies
- #19 Price Watchlist & Alert Rules API
- #16 User Profile Management API
